el_badry_wide_binary_pairs.reason: wide-pair relation, classification, separation, density, epoch, and confidence-statistic evidence
copied Gaia component attribute remains losslessly preserved in source-native typed Parquet; release-native Gaia adapters own scalar scientific evidence and component scope

source_method_document.reason: pinned source method code retained line-for-line with release provenance

integrated detached-binary photometry with explicit missing-value semantics

green_snr_extended_objects.reason: source-native SNR geometry, classification, flux, spectral index, aliases, detail locator, and row lineage

catalog membership, observed sectors, EB morphology, light-curve source, and flags

coherent hydrogen, helium, or mixed-atmosphere white-dwarf model fit

row_selection.reason: retain a relation when either component's three-sigma parallax interval overlaps the deterministic 1,250-ly ingestion buffer
